situational_context: Running comeback day 52 (12 runs completed since May 3). Run #12 overreach on June 21 (7.5 km vs ~4 km planned, suffer 36) absorbed without apparent tissue issues — body battery 60, training readiness 85 today. ACWR normalized to 1.21 (from 1.35 on June 14) as chronic load rose to 19. HRV 7d avg stable at 34.7 ms — below 90d personal baseline (36.2) but not at deep-dive threshold; likely partly suppressed by Paris canicule (41°C). VO2max running up to 40.8. Weight bounced to 103.67 kg (from 102.62 on June 7); combination of caloric surplus (avg 2886 kcal/day, 166g fat/day) and heat-related fluid retention. Run #13 cancelled today due to canicule 41°C — correct per protocol. Chantilly weekend (June 26-28) offers cooler temps and Forêt de Chantilly for training. Next run Sunday June 28. No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest due July 2026.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Vélo endurance Z1-Z2 60 min (Forêt de Chantilly)
RETOUR RUNNING — Run #13 — 4 km Z2 (Forêt de Chantilly)

recommendations.text: Run #13 cancelled today (canicule 41°C) — correct per protocol. Next run Sunday June 28 in Forêt de Chantilly (30°C, shade, soft surface). Cap at 4 km STRICT after Run #12 overreach (7.5 km). Do NOT increase distance until 2 consecutive compliant runs at 4 km.
recommendations.measurable: Run #13 executed at ≤4 km, avg HR ≤130 bpm, no pain >24h post-run

recommendations.text: Protein intake critically low at 119g/day avg (79% of 150g target) while fat is double target at 166g/day. Increase lean protein sources and reduce excess fat. Essential for tendon adaptation during comeback and body recomposition at 103.7 kg.
recommendations.measurable: Protein ≥140g/day avg over next 7 days; fat ≤100g/day

recommendations.text: Hydration critical during canicule. Maintain ≥3L water/day through June 25, add electrolytes. Weight bounce (102.6→103.7 kg) is partly heat-related fluid retention — will clarify after heatwave breaks. Next pesée June 28 (Chantilly — bring portable if possible, otherwise weigh at return).
recommendations.measurable: Water logged ≥2.5L/day; next pesée within ±0.5 kg of 103 kg

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if next run exceeds 4 km
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #12 was 7.5 km vs ~4 km plan — nearly doubled. Must demonstrate discipline before any progression.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if next Withings reading >104 kg
markers_to_watch.reason: Reversed from 102.6 to 103.7 over 14 days. Caloric surplus + heat retention. Need pesée data post-heatwave.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 32 ms
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 34.7 ms, stable but below 90d baseline of 36.2. Expected to recover as canicule breaks.
